title: Tutorial
description: A guided tour through the knowledge graph.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this tutorial.

title.description: Display title shown in the tour menu and sidebar.

description.description: Short description shown in the tour selection menu.

stops.description: Ordered sequence of stops in the tour.

node.description: Node ID to focus on at this stop. Must exist in graph.json.

depth.description: Neighborhood depth to show. Use 1-3 for focused views (aim for 5-10 visible nodes), 99 for all.

title.description: Stop title shown in the sidebar header.

narrative.description: Narrative text. Paragraphs separated by \n\n. Supports inline links: [text](node:id) for graph navigation, [text](https://url) for external.
